mapper.select: select e.id, e.username, e.password, e.name, e.gender, e.phone, e.salary, e.dept_id as deptId, d.name as deptName, e.position, e.entry_date as entryDate, e.image, e.create_time as createTime, e.update_time as updateTime from emp e left join dept d on e.dept_id = d.id where e.id = #{id}
select id, username, password, name from emp where username = #{username} and password = #{password} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into emp(username, password, name, gender, phone, salary, dept_id, position, entry_date, image) values (#{username}, #{password}, #{name}, #{gender}, #{phone}, #{salary}, #{deptId}, #{position}, #{entryDate}, #{image})
mapper.update: update emp set username = #{username}, name = #{name}, gender = #{gender}, phone = #{phone}, salary = #{salary}, dept_id = #{deptId}, position = #{position}, entry_date = #{entryDate}, image = #{image} where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select e.id, e.username, e.name, e.gender, e.phone, e.salary, e.dept_id as deptId, d.name as deptName, e.position, e.entry_date as entryDate, e.image, e.create_time as createTime, e.update_time as updateTime from emp e left join dept d on e.dept_id = d.id order by e.update_time desc
